title: WestJet Student - Software Developer (Co-op) Interview Questions & Practice

content:
# WestJet Student - Software Developer (Co-op) Interview Preparation

Prepare for your WestJet Student - Software Developer (Co-op) internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** Calgary, AB
**Application Status:** Open for Applications

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from WestJet
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

WestJet is offering a Student - Software Developer (Co-op) internship position in Calgary, AB. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research WestJet's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your WestJet interview and increase your chances of success.
